# עמית תורן | Amit Nail Studio — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Amit Nail Studio is a highly-rated nail salon (5.0 stars from 30 reviews) located in Givatayim, Israel, offering a comprehensive range of nail care services including manicure, pedicure, gel polish, French manicure, nail art, nail extensions, nail repair, and removal services. The studio operates late hours (open until 23:30) and is situated at Weizmann 12, Givatayim, reflecting a professional and client-focused beauty business.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://amit-nail-studio-a0509c96.zappy5.app
סטודיו לציפורניים בגבעתיים עם דירוג 5.0 כוכבים. מניקור, פדיקור, לק ג&#39;ל, הארכות ועיצובים עד 23:30 בלילה. קבעי תור עכשיו לחוויית טיפוח יוצאת דופן!

### Contact form

- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About עמית תורן | Amit Nail Studio
Amit Nail Studio is a highly-rated nail salon (5.0 stars from 30 reviews) located in Givatayim, Israel, offering a comprehensive range of nail care services including manicure, pedicure, gel polish, French manicure, nail art, nail extensions, nail repair, and removal services. The studio operates late hours (open until 23:30) and is situated at Weizmann 12, Givatayim, reflecting a professional and client-focused beauty business.

## Target Audience
- נשים מקצועיות צעירות
- כלות לעתיד
- בלוגריות ומשפיעניות יופי

## Industry
Beauty & Nail Care
